title: Ore Borders Legacy
description: This mod is popular in uhc gamemodes and makes ore visibility easier!!!
body:
A mod that makes ore blocks easier to see. Especially useful for UHC games.

ONLY FOR Minecraft 1.8.9!!! it probably won't work for newer versions...

DO NOT DISTRIBUTE/REPOST MY PROJECT TO ANY MINECRAFT MOD SITE SUCH AS CURSEFORGE, 9MINECRAFT, PLANET MINECRAFT, ETC. FOR ANY REASON UNLESS I GIVE YOU EXPLICIT PERMISSION!!!

Pictures:

![All Minecraft 1.8.9 ores together with the mod enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309b7900ace24c5ad0e1a2acd0aea8ede1c01114.png)
All Minecraft 1.8.9 ores together with the mod enabled
![This mod differentiates ores with borders (in a cave)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3dbe25fdb1c75204299ed5d57f73bb5b9e020f5.png)
This mod is useful in caves so you can find ores easier with this resource pack
